All 45 acceptance-tests.md table rows (AC-001..035, AC-039..048) appear in tasks.md (Requirements field or Scope/Done When explicit reference), confirmed by traceability.md's Acceptance Mapping table (one task per AC, AC-035 shared across all five with explicit per-task differentiation). T-001..T-005 each cite at least one REQ-NNN in their Requirements field (T-001: REQ-001/006/007/008; T-002: REQ-002/006/008; T-003: REQ-003/006/008; T-004: REQ-004/005/006/008; T-005: REQ-006/008). No orphan task.

Tasks whose titles contain 'test' (T-001..T-004, all titled '...test suite(s)') each cite AC-NNN ids in their Requirements field and/or Done When list (e.g. T-001 cites AC-001..011, AC-017/018/028/034/035/041/047/048). T-005's title contains no 'test'/'spec'/'verify' substring and its scope is not exclusively test-file changes (it also authors/extends a non-test drift-gate script), so it does not trigger this check's test-task definition; it references AC-031/032/033/043/035 regardless.
Round 1 / Attempt 1 (pre-implementation rule applies). T-001..T-005 each declare exactly 'Approval: Draft' and 'Status: Planned'. No task deviates.

T-001: Risk: high / Required Workflow: tdd. T-002: medium / acceptance-first. T-003: high / tdd. T-004: high / tdd. T-005: medium / acceptance-first. Every pairing matches the risk-gate-matrix (low->test-after, medium->acceptance-first, high/critical->tdd); precheck-result.json workflow_match_precheck: PASS confirms no mismatch.

traceability.md's Acceptance Mapping table shows every AC-NNN mapped to exactly one task except AC-035, which is explicitly shared across T-001..T-005 with stated per-task differentiation ('each task's own CHANGELOG bullet + own no-version-bump grep self-check'); acceptance-tests.md's own TEST-035 description defines this check as run once per task landing. This matches the check's distinct-scope exception, not an undifferentiated duplicate.

Every task-ID referenced in a Blockers field (T-001 in T-002/003/004/005; T-002 in T-003/004/005; T-003 in T-004/005; T-004 in T-005) exists in tasks.md and in dependency-graph.json's nodes array (['T-001'..'T-005']). No dangling reference.

BLOCKERS-FORMAT is PASS, so this check ran. dependency-graph.json's edges (T-002->T-001, T-003->T-001, T-003->T-002, T-004->T-001, T-004->T-002, T-004->T-003, T-005->T-001, T-005->T-002, T-005->T-003, T-005->T-004) form a strict total order T-001<T-002<T-003<T-004<T-005 — a DAG with no revisited node. No cycle found.

T-001..T-004's '<schema/comparator> and its test suite(s)' titles satisfy the test-work exception (schema/validator + its own test suite, one coherent artifact). T-005 bundles the vendored-copy drift-gate extension and the cross-script parity suite; its own 'Note on scope breadth (TASK-SIZE)' explains they are one verification/packaging unit over T-001..T-004's already-built scripts (the parity suite's AC-032 fixtures are the mechanism that exercises the vendored copies the drift gate protects), not two distinct feature concerns. No Major finding.

Every Done When item across T-001..T-005 names a concrete test command (e.g. 'sh tests/facet-manifest-schema.tests.sh exits 0'), a specific evidence artifact (verification/T-00N/{red,green}-sh.log, metaschema-conformance.md, MANIFEST.sha256 entries), or a grep self-check outcome. No forbidden vague verb ('ensure', 'consider', 'works correctly', 'verify is correct', 'review <X>' without outcome, 'confirm <X>' without a specific result, 'update <X>' without a measurable target) found in any Done When list. No Done When item requires editing tasks.md/traceability.md/design.md; all target CHANGELOG.md, verification/ logs, or human-copy staging artifacts instead.

T-001..T-005 each have entries in traceability.md's Task Mapping and Deliverables tables. REQ-001..REQ-008 (traceability.md) all exist in requirements.md. Every requirement row cites canonical <layer>-spec.md#<section> anchors that were confirmed to exist as literal headers in the hash-bound layer documents (design.md#api--contract-plan, #design-decisions-resolving-open-questions, #components, #global-constraints, #adr-change-log, #test-strategy; security-spec.md#trust-boundaries, #stride-analysis, #security-tests, #sbom-and-supply-chain; infra-spec.md#deployment-topology, #cicd-sequence, #data-residency-and-retention), except REQ-008 which carries a reasoned 'N/A — cross-layer only: <reason>' value as permitted.
